specific_question: How has using CRM software made MediConn's services even more cost-effective for patients over the past year, and how much savings potential does this represent forward into the next year?
answer: According to an internal financial review conducted from September 2024 to September 2025, MediConn has been able to save 20% on labor costs by automating repetitive processes through its CRM, a savings which has been passed directly on to its clients through lower annual fees. This savings is projected to increase to 23% over the next year.
dr_question: The WTT Solution article from March 2025 indicates that Customer Relationship Management (CRM) software is trending in the healthcare industry. How can MediConn Solutions leverage this software to drive the growth of its healthcare services, using patient benefits from the software as a key to increased business by the year 2028?
